propositions: Pass-4 coaching (move notes and guide_url deep-links) currently runs only over surviving advisory findings, so blocking findings receive no coaching note or guide link.

Coaching must be widened to cover blocking findings at both workflow execution seams (coach_inputs, coach_gate, coach_notes, coach) plus the prompt, sidecar slim, and renderer, preserving reviewer/writer separation and C1 subject validation.
Each coaching entry gains an optional decision tag ('block' or 'advisory') that must survive sidecar persistence via build_payload.
The two structurally identical coach blocks in the then-arm and else-arm of plan-review.yaml must remain binding-identical after the edits.
The coach prompt and listing header must be reframed decision-neutral so they no longer describe the input set as advisory-only.

A BLOCK-only verdict must emit a coaching entry with decision='block' and guide_url, and the rebar review-plan CLI output must render blocking coaching lines and guide links in the existing flat coaching block.
